changelog:
v1.7.5:
- [SEC] HWID Licensing: Advanced hardware-lock security for distribution.
- [UI] Professional Splash Screen: New pulse animation and secure activation interface.
- [SYS] Core Stability: Reverted to native dialogs for 100% crash-free user experience.
- [FIX] Chart Engine: Optimized for Python 3.14 and latest Matplotlib versions.
v1.7.4:
- [NEW] Robust Weekend Shield: Synchronized local and server time for accurate market status.
- [FIX] Chart Stability: Prevented UI crashes during sparse data/weekends.
- [UI] Professional Dark Scrollbars: Consistent aesthetic across all windows.
- [UI] Session Monitor sync: All global sessions now respect weekend status.
v1.7.3:
- [FIX] Build Optimization: Switched to --onedir for maximum stability.
- [FIX] DLL Errors: Eliminated "Python DLL not found" issues on Windows.
- [UI] Layout Refinement: Optimized update window and log visibility.
- [SYS] Mutex Implementation: Prevented multiple instances for professional distribution.
